item.title: Meet MOAC in the Workshop
item.description: An introduction to MOAC, a large workshop machine or project featured during heavy fabrication and repair work. The video explores its role, capabilities, and workshop use. What’s the most impressive workshop machine you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Meet MOAC in the Workshop
media:content.media:description: An introduction to MOAC, a large workshop machine or project featured during heavy fabrication and repair work. The video explores its role, capabilities, and workshop use. What’s the most impressive workshop machine you’ve seen?

item.title: CAT D10 Dozer Cylinder Rebuild
item.description: A heavy equipment rebuild project focused on restoring a hydraulic cylinder from a CAT D10 dozer. The video highlights machining, repair work, and workshop techniques. What makes large equipment rebuilds so satisfying to watch?

media:content.media:title: CAT D10 Dozer Cylinder Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment rebuild project focused on restoring a hydraulic cylinder from a CAT D10 dozer. The video highlights machining, repair work, and workshop techniques. What makes large equipment rebuilds so satisfying to watch?

item.title: Full Repair of a D10 Tilt Cylinder
item.description: A full repair on a D10 blade tilt cylinder, showing the machining and hydraulic work involved in restoring the component to service. A practical look at precision repair and workshop

media:content.media:title: Full Repair of a D10 Tilt Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A full repair on a D10 blade tilt cylinder, showing the machining and hydraulic work involved in restoring the component to service. A practical look at precision repair and workshop

item.title: Vertical Bore Welding on the Mill
item.description: Using a Sir Meccanica WS2 portable bore welder, the bores are welded vertically while still on the mill. A precise workshop process that keeps the repair in place and the machining aligned. How does

media:content.media:title: Vertical Bore Welding on the Mill
media:content.media:description: Using a Sir Meccanica WS2 portable bore welder, the bores are welded vertically while still on the mill. A precise workshop process that keeps the repair in place and the machining aligned. How does

item.title: Kurtis works through the Franna Winch Project
item.description: A workshop update following progress on a Franna winch project involving fabrication, repair work, and mechanical problem-solving. The video highlights hands-on engineering and workshop planning. What part of heavy equipment projects interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Kurtis works through the Franna Winch Project
media:content.media:description: A workshop update following progress on a Franna winch project involving fabrication, repair work, and mechanical problem-solving. The video highlights hands-on engineering and workshop planning. What part of heavy equipment projects interests you most?

item.title: Building a fume extraction system for metal arc
item.description: A fabrication project focused on building a fume extraction system for metal arc work in the workshop. The video covers design, construction, and improving workspace safety. What workshop upgrade would you add first?

media:content.media:title: Building a fume extraction system for metal arc
media:content.media:description: A fabrication project focused on building a fume extraction system for metal arc work in the workshop. The video covers design, construction, and improving workspace safety. What workshop upgrade would you add first?

item.title: Replacing Old Bushings with New Ones
item.description: A workshop maintenance project focused on removing worn bushings and installing new replacements. The video highlights repair techniques and equipment restoration work. How important is preventative maintenance for heavy equipment?

media:content.media:title: Replacing Old Bushings with New Ones
media:content.media:description: A workshop maintenance project focused on removing worn bushings and installing new replacements. The video highlights repair techniques and equipment restoration work. How important is preventative maintenance for heavy equipment?

item.title: Oxy Gas Cutting a Broken D11 Shank
item.description: A heavy repair project using oxy gas cutting techniques to remove a broken D11 ripper shank. The video focuses on industrial repair work and workshop processes. What workshop tool do you think is the most essential?

media:content.media:title: Oxy Gas Cutting a Broken D11 Shank
media:content.media:description: A heavy repair project using oxy gas cutting techniques to remove a broken D11 ripper shank. The video focuses on industrial repair work and workshop processes. What workshop tool do you think is the most essential?

item.title: Parts washer build from start to finish
item.description: A full build project following the fabrication and assembly of a heavy-duty parts washer from start to finish. The video highlights workshop tools, welding, and practical engineering work. Which stage of the build stood out most?

media:content.media:title: Parts washer build from start to finish
media:content.media:description: A full build project following the fabrication and assembly of a heavy-duty parts washer from start to finish. The video highlights workshop tools, welding, and practical engineering work. Which stage of the build stood out most?

item.title: Custom pin for a Caterpillar 3500 engine head
item.description: A machining project focused on creating a custom pin for a Caterpillar 3500 engine head assembly. The video highlights precision work and fabrication techniques. What makes custom machining projects so interesting to watch?

media:content.media:title: Custom pin for a Caterpillar 3500 engine head
media:content.media:description: A machining project focused on creating a custom pin for a Caterpillar 3500 engine head assembly. The video highlights precision work and fabrication techniques. What makes custom machining projects so interesting to watch?

item.title: Cummins 6BT prep: fixing a key engine issue
item.description: A repair and preparation project focused on addressing an important issue with a Cummins 6BT engine. The video covers inspection, workshop techniques, and mechanical problem-solving. What engine project would you like to see tackled next?

media:content.media:title: Cummins 6BT prep: fixing a key engine issue
media:content.media:description: A repair and preparation project focused on addressing an important issue with a Cummins 6BT engine. The video covers inspection, workshop techniques, and mechanical problem-solving. What engine project would you like to see tackled next?

item.title: 7-Meter Lathe in Action
item.description: A closer look at a large industrial lathe operating on heavy-duty machining work. The video highlights precision turning, scale, and workshop engineering processes. What’s the largest machine tool you’ve seen in operation?

media:content.media:title: 7-Meter Lathe in Action
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a large industrial lathe operating on heavy-duty machining work. The video highlights precision turning, scale, and workshop engineering processes. What’s the largest machine tool you’ve seen in operation?

item.title: Progress on a heavy-duty parts washer
item.description: An update on the ongoing fabrication and assembly of a heavy-duty parts washer. The video follows workshop progress and key build stages. What part of a fabrication build interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Progress on a heavy-duty parts washer
media:content.media:description: An update on the ongoing fabrication and assembly of a heavy-duty parts washer. The video follows workshop progress and key build stages. What part of a fabrication build interests you most?

item.title: Cylinder Rod Repair
item.description: A workshop repair focused on restoring a damaged hydraulic cylinder rod through machining and precision repair techniques. The video highlights practical engineering work and problem-solving. Why are hydraulic repairs so satisfying to watch?

media:content.media:title: Cylinder Rod Repair
media:content.media:description: A workshop repair focused on restoring a damaged hydraulic cylinder rod through machining and precision repair techniques. The video highlights practical engineering work and problem-solving. Why are hydraulic repairs so satisfying to watch?

item.title: Repairing a Tilt Bracket for a 90T Excavator
item.description: A heavy equipment repair project focused on restoring a tilt bracket from a 90-ton excavator. The video covers inspection, welding, machining, and structural repair work. What’s the most impressive heavy machinery repair you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Repairing a Tilt Bracket for a 90T Excavator
media:content.media:description: A heavy equipment repair project focused on restoring a tilt bracket from a 90-ton excavator. The video covers inspection, welding, machining, and structural repair work. What’s the most impressive heavy machinery repair you’ve seen?

item.title: Drilling and Tapping Hard Jaws
item.description: A machining-focused video showing the process of drilling and tapping hardened jaws with precision tools and techniques. The project highlights careful setup and workshop craftsmanship. What machining process do you find most satisfying to watch?

media:content.media:title: Drilling and Tapping Hard Jaws
media:content.media:description: A machining-focused video showing the process of drilling and tapping hardened jaws with precision tools and techniques. The project highlights careful setup and workshop craftsmanship. What machining process do you find most satisfying to watch?

item.title: New Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: A look at the build and setup of a new heavy-duty parts washer for industrial workshop use. The video highlights fabrication details and workshop functionality. What feature would matter most in a parts washer?

media:content.media:title: New Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: A look at the build and setup of a new heavy-duty parts washer for industrial workshop use. The video highlights fabrication details and workshop functionality. What feature would matter most in a parts washer?

item.title: Fabricating a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
item.description: A fabrication project focused on building a heavy-duty parts washer designed for workshop and machinery cleaning. The video covers construction, welding, and assembly work. What workshop tool do you think saves the most time?

media:content.media:title: Fabricating a Heavy-Duty Parts Washer
media:content.media:description: A fabrication project focused on building a heavy-duty parts washer designed for workshop and machinery cleaning. The video covers construction, welding, and assembly work. What workshop tool do you think saves the most time?
